executeSQLs: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS today_menu;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `biz_dish` (`id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `code` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL, `name` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `category` int NOT NULL, `image_url` varchar(512) NOT NULL, `description` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL, `sort` int DEFAULT 0, `status` int DEFAULT 0, `deleted` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0, `createdon` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `lastchangedon` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `createdby` varchar(64) DEFAULT '', `lastchangedby` varchar(64) DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET = utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `biz_daily_menu` (`id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `code` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL, `menu_date` date NOT NULL, `dish_id` bigint NOT NULL, `sort` int DEFAULT 0, `deleted` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0, `createdon` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `lastchangedon` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `createdby` varchar(64) DEFAULT '', `lastchangedby` varchar(64) DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_menu_date` (`menu_date`)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET = utf8mb4;
